name: amoCRM Read-only SQL
description: Safe read-only SQL access to an existing amoCRM PostgreSQL database. Does not create or manage PostgreSQL.

sslmode.description: SSL mode: disable | allow | prefer | require | verify-ca | verify-full

get_amocrm_schema.name: get_amocrm_schema
get_amocrm_schema.label: Схема amoCRM
get_amocrm_schema.description: Return the static read-only schema dictionary for the amoCRM PostgreSQL mirror.

query_amocrm_database.name: query_amocrm_database
query_amocrm_database.label: Запрос к базе amoCRM
query_amocrm_database.description: Execute a safe read-only SQL query against the existing amoCRM PostgreSQL mirror.
